description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a robust metallic head and a red, ergonomically contoured handle. The head is composed of a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw on the opposite side, designed for pulling nails. The handle appears to be made of a composite or fiberglass core with a textured, rubberized grip for comfort and slip resistance. The metallic head is finished in a matte gray, with clean, sharp lines and no visible signs of wear or branding. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for construction, carpentry, or general urban maintenance tasks. The hammer's proportions and materials suggest it is both durable and comfortable for extended use.
description: A red-handled claw hammer with a matte gray metal head and ergonomic, textured grip. Features a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the hammer, highlighting the curved claw and the red ergonomic handle.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow width of the hammer head and the handle, with the striking face visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the claw and handle curvature clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the hammer head and the full width of the handle's grip.
attribute_handle_type: Ergonomic, slightly curved fiberglass handle with a red rubberized textured grip for enhanced comfort and slip resistance.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal, made of matte gray steel.
